source.title: Grave marker — Sherebiah Lambert & wife Pamelia
source.citation: Gravestone of Sherebiah Lambert (d. 1 May 1833, aged 74) and his wife Pamelia (d. 16 Jan 1845, aged 77); photograph of the monument (likely Canaan, Somerset County, Maine — burial place per DB, not stated on the stone).
source.notes: Photograph of a shared headstone. Inscription names Sherebiah Lambert and 'Pamelia, his wife'. Age-74-at-1833-death matches Sherebiah Lambert Jr (P-0105, b. 1759), not Sr (P-0138, b. 1728).

media.title: Sherebiah & Pamelia Lambert headstone
media.caption: Shared grave marker; 'SHEREBIAH LAMBERT / DIED May 1, 1833 / Æ 74' over 'PAMELIA, his wife / Died Jan. 16, 1845 / Æ. 77'.

transcription:
SHEREBIAH LAMBERT
DIED
May 1, 1833.
Æ 74
PAMELIA,
his wife
Died Jan. 16, 1845.
Æ. 77.

citations.claim: Aged 74 at death (Æ 74), implying birth c. 1758-1759 — consistent with recorded 11 Sep 1759

citations.locator: lower inscription, 'PAMELIA, his wife / Died Jan. 16, 1845'

citations.claim: Aged 77 at death (Æ. 77), implying birth c. 1767-1768
citations.locator: age line 'Æ. 77' beneath her death date
